C002.text:
INSPECTION REPORT — REC-20260511-001, DS-31740-A1, SUP-0318 (New supplier), PO #MER-PO-104935.

100% inspection complete per Section 15.2.3. 60 units inspected.

Physical condition: PASS — no damage observed.
Quantity: PASS — 60 units received, matches packing slip.
Heat numbers on parts/pallet tags: H46-0119881 (pallets 1–3), H46-0119902 (pallet 4).
MTR on file (MER-PO-104935_MTR.pdf) covers: H46-0119881 only.

H46-0119902 is not listed on the MTR. Heat number mismatch per Section 12.6.3. Marked-up packing slip attached.
Confirmed. Full quarantine required. I will investigate with Acevedo. Do not release any units from Q-HOLD without my written email authorization.
Out of office 05/15 — off-site training. Available 05/19 first shift. Any pending inspections held until then.

INSPECTION REPORT — REC-20260515-004, TR-08824-B2, SUP-0112 (Probation), PO #MER-PO-104877 line 002.

Sample inspection complete per Section 15.2.2. 48 units inspected (100% sample per probation requirement).

Physical condition: PASS — no damage observed.
Quantity: PASS — 48 units received, matches packing slip.
Heat numbers on parts/pallet tags: H46-0188801.
MTR on file (MER-PO-104877_MTR.pdf) covers: H46-0188801. Match confirmed.
COC on file (MER-PO-104877_COC.pdf): verified.

No nonconformances identified. Recommend ACCEPTED CLEAN.

C003.text: ESCALATION — OVERRIDE OVERDUE MAJOR NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0044, SUP-0112 Dawson Precision Machining, PO #MER-PO-104801. Major NCR overdue — no supplier response received. Response was due 04/11/2026. Escalating per Section 14.5.1. @jpark @tbrandt
Acknowledged. I will contact Dawson directly. This NCR plus NCR-MER-2026-0031 are both being factored into supplier status review.

ESCALATION — OVERRIDE HEAT NUMBER MISMATCH: REC-20260511-001, Acevedo Driveshaft Components, PO #MER-PO-104935. Trigger: Heat number mismatch. MTR heat numbers: H46-0119881. Physical heat numbers: H46-0119881, H46-0119902. Dollar value: $37,680.00. Override trigger: Section 16.2.1. Disposition: QUARANTINE — full receipt. NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0062 pending. Awaiting guidance from Theo Brandt and Elizabeth Velasquez. @tbrandt @evelasquez
Acknowledged. Quarantine is correct. I will review the NCR draft when you send it. Do not release Q-HOLD without my written email. Investigation underway with Acevedo.
Acknowledged. Keep me posted on supplier response. Coordinate with Theo on NCR letter before it goes out.
OVERDUE CRITICAL NCR: NCR-MER-2026-0062, Acevedo Driveshaft Components, 3 business days overdue. No supplier response. Escalating per Section 14.5.1. @tbrandt @jpark @wfinch
Acknowledged. I will contact Acevedo directly today. Quarantine on DS-31740-A1 remains in place — do not release Q-HOLD without my written email authorization.
Acknowledged. I will follow up commercially. No supplier communication from the coordinator — route everything to me.

SUSPENDED SUPPLIER ARRIVAL: Greystone Transmission Parts (SUP-0401, Suspended since 04/28/2026), arrived with PO #MER-PO-104968, Freight Masters Inc., Dock 1. Refusing per Section 15.2.4. Awaiting Procurement guidance on supplier communication. @jpark @dhooks @evelasquez
Acknowledged. I will handle all communication with Greystone. Do not contact the supplier directly.
Acknowledged. Theo and Joon-ho — please keep me posted on Acevedo's response. Quarantine stays in place.

C004.text: Line-down risk check — PO #MER-PO-104851 line 001, SKU BG-33044-A1, short by 22 units (Band 2, −7.6%). On-hand prior to receipt: 72 units at B-08-02. Please advise consumption rate and risk. @akrishnamurthy

Reviewed. Current on-hand plus the 266 received puts us at 338 total. Daily consumption rate is approximately 18 units. We have roughly 18 days of cover — no line-down risk within 48 hours. Continue with standard disposition.

Overdue PO lines — MER-PO-104820, Halverson Forge & Steel. Halverson delivered line 003 (AX-05312-C1) today. Lines 001 and 002 were not in this shipment:
- Line 001: AX-04827-B2, 240 units, Required_Delivery_Date 03/24/2026 — 57 days overdue
- Line 002: FG-91144-A1, 180 units, Required_Delivery_Date 04/07/2026 — 42 days overdue
Both safety-critical. Please advise line-down risk and consumption status. @akrishnamurthy @jpark

Reviewed. Current on-hand for AX-04827-B2: 88 units — approximately 14 days cover at current rate. FG-91144-A1: 60 units on hand — approximately 10 days cover. No immediate line-down risk within 48 hours but both are approaching critical threshold. Joon-ho please expedite with Halverson.
DTL ARRIVAL: REC-20260519-002, FL-55200-A1, 20 drums delivered to LINE-ASMB-02 at 10:38 CST. Receipt complete.
